title: KE-40409
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''KE-40409''' was a [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-X]] attached to [[Bravo Flight (New Republic)|Bravo Flight]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]. It was piloted by [[Second Lieutenant/Legends|Second Lieutenant]] [[Plat Mallar]].

==Notes and references==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
